name: Parfit Coconut Creek
about: Parfit Indoor Golf operates as a high-tech golf simulation venue with locations in Naples and Coconut Creek, Florida. The facility offers advanced Golfzon simulators with access to world-famous golf courses, virtual tournaments, and practice modes. Pricing includes membership options providing 50% off bookings, with flexible non-commitment plans available. The venue is best suited for casual players seeking an entertaining golf experience with food and drink options, as well as those looking for structured practice or group events.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfzon's technologically advanced simulators with over 250 patents
Flexible non-commitment membership options with 50% off bookings
Versatile venue suitable for casual play, serious practice, and group events

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service beyond event packages

simulator_hardware.notes: Technologically advanced golf simulators with over 250 patents

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Golf clubs are required to play, though rentals may be available - contact the venue directly

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: No outside food or drink is permitted, though the venue offers a full bar for events

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1.5-2 hours depending on simulator software and pace of play

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Parfit is family-friendly and suitable for juniors and youth golfers
